mapper.select: SELECT * FROM ( SELECT rownum AS rnum, A.* FROM ( SELECT RC.DETAIL_ID AS detailId, C.ROOM_NAME AS roomName, C.ROOM_IMG AS roomImg, CA.CAFE_NAME AS cafeName, RC.PLAY_TIME AS playTime, RC.HINT_COUNT AS hintCount, RC.PLAYER_COUNT AS peopleCount, RO.OPEN_AT AS playDate, RC.RECORD_COMMENT AS recordComment, RC.IS_ESCAPED AS isEscaped, RV.REVIEW_ID AS reviewId, RV.DIFFICULTY AS difficulty, RV.HORROR AS horror, RV.ACTIVITY AS activity, RV.IMMERSION AS immersion, RV.SATISFACTION AS satisfaction, RV.REVIEW_COMMENT AS reviewComment, CASE WHEN RV.DETAIL_ID IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END AS hasReview FROM RECORD RC JOIN ATTENDANCE_DETAIL AD ON RC.DETAIL_ID = AD.DETAIL_ID JOIN ATTENDANCE AT ON AD.ATTENDANCE_ID = AT.ATTENDANCE_ID JOIN RESERVATION RS ON AT.RESERVATION_ID = RS.RESERVATION_ID JOIN PARTY P ON RS.PARTY_ID = P.PARTY_ID JOIN PARTY_ROOM PR ON P.PARTY_ID = PR.PARTY_ID JOIN RES_OPEN RO ON PR.RES_OPEN_ID = RO.RES_OPEN_ID JOIN ROOM C ON RO.ROOM_ID = C.ROOM_ID JOIN CAFE CA ON C.CAFE_ID = CA.CAFE_ID LEFT OUTER JOIN REVIEW RV ON RC.DETAIL_ID = RV.DETAIL_ID WHERE AD.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY RO.OPEN_AT DESC ) A WHERE rownum <= #{endRow} ) WHERE rnum >= #{startRow}

SELECT AD2.DETAIL_ID AS detailId, AD2.USER_ID AS targetId, UA.NICKNAME AS targetNickName, RM.ROOM_NAME, RO.OPEN_AT, CA.CAFE_NAME FROM ATTENDANCE_DETAIL AD1 JOIN ATTENDANCE_DETAIL AD2 ON AD1.ATTENDANCE_ID = AD2.ATTENDANCE_ID JOIN ATTENDANCE AT ON AD1.ATTENDANCE_ID = AT.ATTENDANCE_ID JOIN RESERVATION RS ON AT.RESERVATION_ID = RS.RESERVATION_ID JOIN PARTY_ROOM PR ON RS.PARTY_ID = PR.PARTY_ID JOIN RES_OPEN RO ON PR.RES_OPEN_ID = RO.RES_OPEN_ID JOIN ROOM RM ON RO.ROOM_ID = RM.ROOM_ID JOIN CAFE CA ON CA.CAFE_ID = RM.CAFE_ID JOIN USER_ACCOUNT UA ON AD2.USER_ID = UA.USER_ID WHERE AD1.USER_ID = #{userId} AND AD2.USER_ID != AD1.USER_ID
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM MUTUAL_EVALUATION ME JOIN ATTENDANCE_DETAIL AD3 ON ME.DETAIL_ID = AD3.DETAIL_ID WHERE AD3.ATTENDANCE_ID = AD1.ATTENDANCE_ID AND ME.TARGET_ID = AD2.USER_ID ) ORDER BY RO.OPEN_AT DESC, AT.ATTENDANCE_ID ASC, AD2.USER_ID ASC
SELECT FN_GET_MANNER(#{userId}) AS MANNER FROM DUAL

SELECT C.ROOM_NAME AS roomName, C.ROOM_IMG AS roomImg, RC.PLAY_TIME AS playTime, RC.HINT_COUNT AS hintCount, RC.PLAYER_COUNT AS peopleCount, RO.OPEN_AT AS playDate, RC.RECORD_COMMENT AS recordComment, RC.IS_ESCAPED AS isEscaped FROM RECORD RC JOIN ATTENDANCE_DETAIL AD ON RC.DETAIL_ID = AD.DETAIL_ID JOIN ATTENDANCE AT ON AD.ATTENDANCE_ID = AT.ATTENDANCE_ID JOIN RESERVATION RS ON AT.RESERVATION_ID = RS.RESERVATION_ID JOIN PARTY P ON RS.PARTY_ID = P.PARTY_ID JOIN PARTY_ROOM PR ON P.PARTY_ID = PR.PARTY_ID JOIN RES_OPEN RO ON PR.RES_OPEN_ID = RO.RES_OPEN_ID JOIN ROOM C ON RO.ROOM_ID = C.ROOM_ID WHERE AD.USER_ID = #{userId} ORDER BY RO.OPEN_AT DESC

SELECT CA.CAFE_NAME AS cafeName, C.ROOM_NAME AS roomName, RO.OPEN_AT AS playDate, AD.DETAIL_ID AS detailId FROM ATTENDANCE_DETAIL AD JOIN ATTENDANCE AT ON AD.ATTENDANCE_ID = AT.ATTENDANCE_ID JOIN RESERVATION RS ON AT.RESERVATION_ID = RS.RESERVATION_ID JOIN PARTY P ON RS.PARTY_ID = P.PARTY_ID JOIN PARTY_ROOM PR ON P.PARTY_ID = PR.PARTY_ID JOIN RES_OPEN RO ON PR.RES_OPEN_ID = RO.RES_OPEN_ID JOIN ROOM C ON RO.ROOM_ID = C.ROOM_ID JOIN CAFE CA ON C.CAFE_ID = CA.CAFE_ID LEFT JOIN RECORD RC ON AD.DETAIL_ID = RC.DETAIL_ID WHERE AD.USER_ID = #{userId} AND AD.ATTEND_STATUS_ID = 1 AND RC.DETAIL_ID IS NULL ORDER BY RO.OPEN_AT DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO RECORD (RECORD_ID, DETAIL_ID, PLAY_TIME, HINT_COUNT, PLAYER_COUNT , RECORD_COMMENT, IS_ESCAPED) VALUES (RECORD_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{detailId}, #{playTime}, #{hintCount}, #{peopleCount}, #{recordComment}, #{isEscaped})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM RECORD RC JOIN ATTENDANCE_DETAIL AD ON RC.DETAIL_ID = AD.DETAIL_ID WHERE AD.USER_ID = #{userId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO REVIEW ( REVIEW_ID, DETAIL_ID, DIFFICULTY, HORROR, ACTIVITY, IMMERSION, SATISFACTION, REVIEW_COMMENT) VALUES ( REVIEW_SEQ.NEXTVAL, #{detailId}, #{difficulty}, #{horror}, #{activity}, #{immersion}, #{satisfaction}, #{reviewComment})
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM REVIEW WHERE DETAIL_ID = #{detailId}
mapper.update: UPDATE REVIEW SET DIFFICULTY = #{difficulty}, HORROR = #{horror}, ACTIVITY = #{activity}, IMMERSION = #{immersion}, SATISFACTION = #{satisfaction}, REVIEW_COMMENT = #{reviewComment} WHERE DETAIL_ID = #{detailId}
